title: Alibaba says Qwen3.8 is the world’s No.2 AI model. It has shown no proof.
summary: The company previewed Qwen3.8, its most powerful model yet, and made a bold claim: it trails only one model on Earth. Alibaba, like Moonshot, is putting the model in paid products first and releasing the weights later.
caption: output/2026-07-20/alibaba-says-qwen3-8-is-the-world-s-no-2-ai-model-it-has-shown-no-proo.txt
